# Tap Bible module repository

A SWORD install repository serving Tap Bible's generated commentary modules.
Consumed by the app via ksword's installer (`mods.d.tar.gz` + `zip/<INITIALS>.zip`).

Modules: MHM, MHKO

**Auto-generated — do not hand-edit.** Rebuilt by `sword-commentary-generator`'s
`--build-repo` mode; commit and push the result to publish.
